top3.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE r.name = 'San Marino Grand Prix' AND r.year = 2006 AND res.position = '2';

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE r.name = 'San Marino Grand Prix' AND r.year = 2006 AND res.position = '2';

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM results res
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE r.name = 'San Marino Grand Prix' 
  AND r.year = 2006 
  AND CAST(res.position AS INTEGER) = 2;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE r.name = 'San Marino Grand Prix' AND r.year = 2006 AND res.position = '2';

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM results res
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE r.name = 'San Marino Grand Prix' 
  AND r.year = 2006 
  AND CAST(res.position AS INTEGER) = 2;

final.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE r.name = 'San Marino Grand Prix' AND r.year = 2006 AND res.position = '2';
